# Vendored Player Assets

These files are scoped to the isolated Electron prototype. The production Web
preview continues to use its existing runtime path.

## pako 2.1.0

- File: `pako-2.1.0.min.js`
- Source: <https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/pako@2.1.0/dist/pako.min.js>
- npm package: <https://www.npmjs.com/package/pako/v/2.1.0>
- License metadata: MIT and Zlib
- License copy: `licenses/pako-LICENSE`
- SHA-256: `ede2693a4a6a5126b9d35669062b358ecab6ae7b9b86a1cf302feb45a8514907`
- npm integrity: `sha512-w+eufiZ1WuJYg...U1Cm+9Srog2ug==`

## SVGAPlayer-Web 2.3.1

- File: `svgaplayerweb-2.3.1.min.js`
- Source: <https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/svgaplayerweb@2.3.1/build/svga.min.js>
- npm package: <https://www.npmjs.com/package/svgaplayerweb/v/2.3.1>
- License: Apache-2.0
- License copy: `licenses/svgaplayerweb-LICENSE`
- SHA-256: `3e8cb9a59e17a9b0861298eacc4beba79895ebd7178d97669687af07212509b6`
- npm integrity: `sha512-i+7NY6juf6Uxj...ooeEU89/E+cOA==`

The abbreviated npm integrity values are informational. The prototype build
enforces the complete SHA-256 values above before preparing its runtime.
